title: ProDec 20m x 600mm Glass Protector - Waterproof, Self-Adhesive Film Protection For Glass and Glazed Surfaces Against Paint Splashes & Flicks, Dirt & Dust, No Residue When Peeled
features: Waterproof self-adhesive film for temporary protection of glass surfaces during decorating, building or maintenance work
Protects against paint and plaster splashes, sanding dust and dirt
Easy to apply, requires no special applicator tool and leaves no residue when peeled from the surface
Not for use on carpets or hard floors (specific grades are available)
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Protect glass from splashes and dirt whilst working Glass Protector is ideal for keeping glass and other glazed surfaces clean and free from liquid splashes, dust, dirt and general soiling that occurs during decorating, building work and general maintenance. It is made from self-adhesive polythene film that is reverse wound so it applies easily by hand without the need for any special application tools. Glass Protector leaves no adhesive residue when peeled and should be removed within 14 days of application. Note that the product is not re-usable once taken up from the surface. Self-adhesive film products from ProDec Whether it's floors or windows you need to keep free of splashes, spills, dust and dirt during maintenance work, ProDec has a range of self-adhesive films to protect every surface. Carpet Protector Hard Floor Protector Glass Protector Multi-Surface Protector Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 773 4.1 out of 5 stars 773 4.1 out of 5 stars 773 — Price £12.80 £ 12 . 80 £23.95 £ 23 . 95 — no data — no data Roll length 20m, 25m, 50m 20m, 25m, 50m 20m 100m Width 600mm or 625mm 600mm or 625mm 600mm 600mm Where to use Carpets (not wool or stain protection treated) Ceramic tiles, stone, laminate, timber, parquet, vinyl Glass Carpets (not wool or stain protection treated), ceramic tiles, stone, laminate, timber, parquet, vinyl Colour Yellow Clear Blue Green MORE TEMPORARY PROTECTION SOLUTIONS FROM PRODEC - ProDec has a range of products for protecting floors and furniture during decorating and general maintenance work. Polythene dust sheets Made from waterproof recyclable LDPE material and available in both sheets and rolls, polythene is lightweight and cost-effective. Super Cling Super Cling is waterproof recyclable LDPE material that has been statically charged to enable it to cling to virtually any surface without the need for taping, including walls, windows, doors, upholstery, bookcases, furniture, cabinets and much more. Self-adhesive films Made from puncture resistant polythene that enables it to withstand heavy traffic, ProDec’s self-adhesive film protects against liquid spills such as paint, varnish, wallpaper paste, oil, grease, mud and more. It applies easily without the need for any special application tools and stays in place once down. Available in Carpet, Hard Floor and Glass grades. Cotton dust sheets Classic cotton twill fabric that soaks up small splashes of paint, wallpaper paste and other liquids, as well as minimising the transfer of dust and debris. Available in a range of sizes in both standard and Protector waterproof plastic backed versions.
